content:
"brands": {
  "corvia": {
    "brandFont": "'Poppins', sans-serif",
    "brandFontWeights": [
      700,
      800
    ],
    "colors": {
      "darkSurface": "#0d1117",
      "gold": "#D4A832",
      "goldBright": "#E8C44E",
      "lightGray": "#f5f5f7",
      "midGray": "#86868b",
      "navy": "#0f1b33",
      "white": "#ffffff"
    },
    "description": "Product brand. Professional, restrained. Navy + gold. See repos/corvia/docs/brand/ for full guide.",
    "designGuide": "repos/corvia/docs/brand/corvia-brand-guide.html",
    "name": "corvia"
  },
  "personal": {
    "colors": {
      "accentAmber": "#f59e0b",
      "accentBlue": "#3b82f6",
      "accentCyan": "#06b6d4",
      "accentGreen": "#10b981",
      "accentPurple": "#8b5cf6",
      "accentRed": "#ef4444",
      "bgCard": "#1e293b",
      "bgCardAlt": "#334155",
      "bgDark": "#0f172a",
      "border": "#334155",
      "textMuted": "#64748b",
      "textPrimary": "#f1f5f9",
      "textSecondary": "#94a3b8"
    },
    "description": "Developer journal, discovery-style content. Dark theme with multi-color accents.",
    "gradients": {
      "closingSlide": "linear-gradient(160deg, #0f172a 0%, #1a2332 50%, #0f172a 100%)",
      "coverSlide": "linear-gradient(160deg, #0f172a 0%, #1a1a3e 50%, #0f172a 100%)"
    },
    "name": "Lim Chun Zhe"
  }
}
